hero.headline: I help businesses launch AI-powered products
hero.subtitle: From idea to launch — I build MVPs, AI solutions, and scalable web apps that drive real results.

services.title: What I Do
services.subtitle: Web apps, mobile apps, chatbots, AI integrations, automation — if you can dream it, I can build it.

mvp.title: MVP Development
mvp.description: Full-stack web and mobile applications built for speed. Go from concept to launch with a production-ready product in weeks, not months.

ai.title: AI Solutions
ai.description: Custom chatbots, RAG systems, AI agents, and workflow automation. I integrate AI where it creates real business value.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.description: Tech strategy, system architecture, and product scoping. I help you make the right technical decisions from day one.

iopex.title: IOPEX Technologies
iopex.description: Currently building AI-powered automation and intelligent process solutions at IOPEX, a global leader in business process outsourcing and digital transformation.

agnitu.title: Agnitu
agnitu.description: Developed software solutions for Agnitu, a platform focused on identity verification and compliance technology.

claro.title: Claro Colombia
claro.description: Built digital solutions for Claro Colombia, one of Latin America's largest telecommunications providers serving millions of customers.

iqoutsourcing.title: IQ Outsourcing
iqoutsourcing.description: Developed enterprise software for IQ Outsourcing, a leading Colombian BPO company specializing in document management and process optimization.

digitalware.title: Digitalware
digitalware.description: Built enterprise software solutions at Digitalware, a Colombian company specializing in digital transformation and business management platforms.

tatic.title: Tatic
tatic.description: Developed web solutions for Tatic, a consulting and technology services firm delivering digital transformation across Latin America.

justerinis.title: Justerini & Brooks
justerinis.description: E-commerce platform for one of the world's oldest wine and spirits merchants. Built a premium digital experience for Diageo's luxury brand.

cartrawler.title: CarTrawler Customer Portal
cartrawler.description: Built the customer portal for CarTrawler's B2B travel platform, enabling partners to manage car rental and mobility solutions at scale.

meandem.title: ME+EM Homepage
meandem.description: Built the homepage for ME+EM, a British luxury fashion brand. Delivered a high-performance, visually rich storefront experience.

soafee.title: SOAFEE
soafee.description: Led the migration of SOAFEE's website — an Arm-led initiative defining a software architecture for automotive edge computing.

dancecircle.title: DanceCircle
dancecircle.description: Social platform connecting dancers with events, classes, and community. Built with React Native and real-time features.

trackmyspend.title: TrackMySpend
trackmyspend.description: Personal finance tracker with AI-powered insights and spending categorization. Helps users take control of their money.

alexmobile.title: AlexMobile
alexmobile.description: Mobile telecom management app enabling customers to manage their plans, usage, and billing in one place.

aiassistant.title: AI Assistant
aiassistant.description: Intelligent conversational assistant powered by RAG architecture, delivering accurate answers from custom knowledge bases.

jobmatch.title: Job Match
jobmatch.description: AI-driven job matching platform that analyzes resumes and job descriptions to find the best-fit opportunities.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I'm Otto Bonilla — a software engineer with 9+ years of experience building products that people actually use. I wrote my first line of code at 13 and never stopped. I've built software for a mini exploration submarine, shipped products for global brands, and helped startups go from zero to launch.
about.reach: I've worked with clients across Ireland, the UK, New York, San Francisco, Puerto Rico, and Colombia.
about.tech: TypeScript, React, React Native, Next.js, Node.js, Python, AWS, AI/ML, PostgreSQL

contact.title: Let's Build Something
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's talk about how I can help bring it to life.
